name: PhonePe SBI Card PURPLE
exclusions: transactions excluded under PhonePe SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Yatra travel voucher worth Rs 3,000 on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
Renewal fee reversal on annual retail spends of Rs 1 lakh in previous year
additionalBenefits: PhonePe gift card worth Rs 500 after joining fee payment, unless issued under first-year-free offer
3 Reward Points per Rs 100 on select PhonePe spends including recharges, bill payments, insurance and travel
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on eligible online spends
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible spends including Scan & Pay
1 Reward Point equals Re 1 and can be redeemed as statement credit or gift vouchers on SBI Card rewards portal
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends
Available on RuPay and Visa networks
